headline: As Trump Threatens NATO Exit, Schumer Reminds Marco Rubio Of His Own Law Blocking Any Quick Withdrawal— 'Couldn't Act On A Whim'
summary: Senate Majority Leader Chuck Schumer (D-NY) has firmly stated that the Senate will not vote to leave NATO, despite President Donald Trump's recent contemplation of withdrawal.

headline: Will New Middle East A-10 Deployments and Contracts Reshape General Dynamics' (GD) Defense Narrative?
summary: In recent days, General Dynamics has gained fresh defense contracts as the U.S. military doubled A-10 aircraft deployments to the Middle East amid heightened tensions with Iran, supporting demand for the company’s systems and services. This upswing highlights how General Dynamics’ diversified defense portfolio can be pulled into focus when geopolitical risk rises and military activity intensifies. Against this backdrop of increased Middle East deployments, we’ll now examine how the news may...

headline: Is General Dynamics (GD) Offering Value After Recent Share Price Consolidation?
summary: Wondering if General Dynamics at US$350.53 is still offering value or if most of the opportunity is already priced in? This article breaks down what the current market price might be implying. The stock has been relatively steady in the short term, with a 0.6% decline over 7 days and a 3.9% decline over 30 days, while still sitting on a 2.1% year to date gain. Over longer periods, returns of 29.4% over 1 year, 62.9% over 3 years and 111.5% over 5 years frame the current level in a wider...
